narrative:
Reynoldsburg 2-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,202 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
